'''Dedro Needalb''' was an old man who served as an [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] Inspector on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. He also secretly worked for the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{Mo}}
